overview.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that invests in U.S. Treasury bills (the “U.S. Treasuries”) and FLexible EXchange® Options that use as a reference asset, the SPDR® S&P 500® ETF Trust. The fund is non-diversified.
